_comment_scenario: scenarios/143-composer-scripts-curl-sh — CICD-SEC-4 (Poisoned Pipeline Execution) — Composer. DANGER (1): the post-install-cmd scripts hook pipes a remote download straight into a shell; composer runs it automatically on every install/update. DANGER (2): config.allow-plugins is true, so any installed plugin may execute code during install. SAFETY: static fixture nested under scenarios/; composer is never invoked here, pipeline-check parses composer.json statically. See README.md.
name: acme/widget
